description_long: This is a tall, slender obelisk with a weathered, greenish surface, showing signs of age and wear, including patches of exposed material and faded paint. The structure is mounted on a square, dark-colored base that appears solid and robust, providing stability. The obelisk itself is four-sided and tapers smoothly towards the top, with each face showing varying degrees of surface distress and some visible markings or inscriptions. One face features a circular emblem or plaque, while another side displays a rectangular area with engraved or painted text. The overall appearance suggests it is made primarily of metal, possibly cast iron or steel, with a painted finish that has deteriorated over time. The object is utilitarian in design, lacking ornate decoration, and is likely intended as a marker, boundary post, or commemorative feature in an urban environment.
description: A tall, weathered green obelisk with a square dark base, featuring faded paint, surface wear, and some visible inscriptions or plaques. The design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the obelisk's face with a circular emblem or plaque and significant paint wear.
description_view_1: This side displays a rectangular inscription or text area, with more visible surface distress and chipping.
description_view_2: A plain face with heavy weathering and no visible inscriptions or plaques.
description_view_3: The rear view is the darkest, with minimal visible markings and the most pronounced surface wear.
attribute_inscription: One face (view 1) has a rectangular area with engraved or painted text, partially legible, possibly in English, and another face (view 0) has a circular emblem or plaque. The text is faded and difficult to read.
attribute_base_design: The base is a solid, square platform, dark in color, likely made of concrete or metal, with a simple, utilitarian design and no decorative features.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is a simple, pointed termination of the obelisk, with no unique features or decorations, matching the utilitarian style of the rest of the structure.
